app.name: Postcove
app.tagline: Your private mailbox, on your device.

assistant.title: Ask your vault
assistant.subtitle: Ask about your scanned mail. Answers come only from your documents, on your device.
assistant.placeholder: e.g. What's my activation code for TK?
assistant.needKey: Add your AI key to use the assistant.
assistant.emptyVault: Scan a letter first — then you can ask about it.
assistant.ex1: Which deadlines are coming up in the next 30 days?
assistant.ex2: How much am I paying for electricity?
assistant.ex3: What's my customer number for my insurance?
assistant.noAnswer: I couldn't find that in your vault.
assistant.caveat: AI-generated from your documents — may be inaccurate. Verify important details.

dashboard.scanSubtitle: Digitize and auto-categorize your physical mail instantly.
dashboard.needKeyBody: Open Settings → AI Provider to add your Gemini or OpenAI key.
dashboard.noCategoriesHint: Scan a letter and Postcove will sort it into a category automatically — or add one yourself.

timeline.title: Timeline
timeline.subtitle: Upcoming deadlines extracted from your documents.
timeline.empty: No upcoming deadlines. You're all caught up.

vault.title: Document Vault
vault.subtitle: Every letter, stored locally and searchable.
vault.empty: Your vault is empty. Scan a letter to get started.
vault.noFile: No file stored for this document.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your preferences and data privacy.
settings.dangerDesc: Permanently delete all local data and settings.
settings.wipeConfirmBody: This permanently deletes every document and setting stored on this device. This cannot be undone.
settings.wiped: All local data has been wiped.
settings.privacyNotice: Postcove stores your documents only on this device, encrypted at rest (AES-256-GCM). They are never sent to Postcove or any server we operate. We have no backend and no account system.
settings.privacyAiNotice: When you scan a letter — or ask the assistant a question — the image (or your question plus the relevant document text) is sent directly from your device to the AI provider you chose, using your own API key. It is not processed or stored by the makers of Postcove. Review your provider's privacy policy before use.
settings.disclaimer: Disclaimer: This app is an AI-powered tracking assistant. It does not provide binding legal or financial counsel. The user is solely responsible for verifying official legal deadlines independently.

ai.heading: AI Provider (Bring Your Own Key)
ai.intro: Postcove never ships an API key. Add your own — it stays on this device only and is sent directly to your chosen provider when you scan a letter.
ai.noKeyNeeded: Runs locally — no API key needed.
ai.helpHeading: How to get an API key

manage.deleteCategoryConfirm: Delete this category? Its documents will move to “{name}”.

lock.heading: App Lock
lock.desc: Require a PIN (and optionally biometrics) to open the app.
lock.title: {app} is locked
lock.biometricDesc: Use Face ID / Touch ID / fingerprint
lock.biometricFailed: Could not set up biometrics on this device.

onboarding.title: Welcome to {app}
onboarding.subtitle: Your private mailbox — on your device.
onboarding.p1Body: Your documents stay on this device. No account, no cloud, no tracking.
onboarding.p2Body: Everything is encrypted at rest with AES-256. You can add a PIN or biometrics.
onboarding.p3Body: Add a free Google Gemini key (or OpenAI, Claude…). Scans go directly from your device to your provider.

reminders.heading: Deadline reminders
reminders.desc: Get a local notification before each deadline.

backup.heading: Backup & restore
backup.desc: Export an encrypted backup of your vault, or restore one. It's protected by a passphrase you choose — keep it safe; without it the backup can't be read.
